meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Scale Your AI Apps Fast
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with scaling your AI projects. Use this Antigravity project template and Claude Code checklist to build production-ready apps as a student.
content.answer_block: Scaling bottlenecks occur when architecture lacks modularity. The Antigravity project template solves this by enforcing decoupled service layers, enabling rapid iteration. By integrating Claude Code to automate boilerplate and architectural scaffolding, you transition from prototype to production-ready software, ensuring your portfolio projects stand out to top-tier technical recruiters.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks crafting your first AI application, but as features stack up, your codebase feels like a house of cards. Every new integration triggers a cascading failure, and the dream of a scalable SaaS turns into a debugging nightmare. You aren't failing; you are simply outgrowing your initial scaffolding.

The Antigravity project template is the industry-standard antidote to this architectural paralysis. By decoupling your business logic from your AI orchestration, you gain the ability to scale features independently. Combined with the surgical precision of Claude Code, you can now build with the speed and structural integrity of a senior engineer.

steps.title: Initialize Modular Architecture
steps.description: Establish the foundational structure that separates your API handlers from your AI agent services, preventing code bloat.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project structure with a clean separation between /api, /services, and /agents directories.

steps.title: Configure Schema Validation
steps.description: Implement strict data contracts to ensure that as your AI model evolves, your input/output handling remains robust.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Pydantic schemas for all incoming data payloads to enforce strict type checking across the application.

steps.title: Abstract AI Provider Logic
steps.description: Create a provider-agnostic interface so you can swap models without rewriting your core business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an LLM abstraction layer that allows switching between Claude, GPT, and local models via a single config file.

steps.title: Implement State Management
steps.description: Handle conversation history and context windows efficiently to prevent memory leaks in long-running AI sessions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a lightweight Redis-backed state manager to handle session context for multi-turn AI interactions.

steps.title: Deploy Observability Hooks
steps.description: Integrate telemetry to track agent performance, latency, and token usage, which is essential for scaling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Inject OpenTelemetry hooks into all agent service methods to track execution latency and token costs.

pro_tips: Always use a separate 'sandbox' branch when testing new AI model providers to prevent production regressions.
Keep your prompt templates in a dedicated JSON file rather than hardcoding them into your Python logic.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your edge-case handlers before writing the main logic for a feature.
Implement rate-limiting middleware at the entry point to protect your API keys during the development phase.
Document your architectural decisions in a 'DECISIONS.md' file to explain your scaling choices to future employers.
content.next_steps: Once your core architecture is stable, begin refactoring your most complex feature into an independent micro-agent using the Antigravity pattern to test your system's modularity.
content.conversion_block: Stop building monoliths that break under pressure. Master the workflow that turns student experiments into professional-grade AI applications. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
